Solutions
Aspen:

Task1: Update first pause minute for a session
Mysql:
Query: UPDATE watch_sessions_temp SET pause_min1 = 50 WHERE session_id = 1
Run times: [0.0009359169052913785, 0.0009362499695271254, 0.0026944580022245646, 0.000803499948233366, 0.0017412080196663737, 0.0009173750877380371, 0.0012355410726740956, 0.0015219580382108688, 0.0007405419601127505, 0.001189458998851478]
Average: 0.0012716208002530038

MongoDB:
Query: db.watch_sessions_temp.update_one({"_id":1}, {"$set":{"watch_details.pause_schedule.0": 50}})
Run times: [0.0005245000356808305, 0.0004581250250339508, 0.000517957960255444, 0.0005139169516041875, 0.0004114171024411917, 0.00038400001358240843, 0.00040749995969235897, 0.00046854105312377214, 0.00043875002302229404, 0.0004122920800000429]
Average: 0.0004537000204436481

Task2: Customers by age and contact criteria
Mysql:
Query: SELECT * FROM customers WHERE (age < 20 OR age > 50) AND (contact_number IS NOT NULL OR email IS NOT NULL)
Run times: [0.04136274999473244, 0.034324167063459754, 0.03612312499899417, 0.04702275001909584, 0.03682954201940447, 0.03333033400122076, 0.03387841710355133, 0.03300274990033358, 0.03361675003543496, 0.03336712496820837]
Average: 0.03628577101044357

MongoDB:
Query: db.customers.find({"$and":[{"$or":[{"age": {"$lt": 20}}, {"age": {"$gt": 50}}]}, {"$or": [{"contact_number": {"$ne": None}},{"email": {"$ne": None}}]}]})
Run times: [2.5792047381401062e-05, 3.9041973650455475e-05, 2.7374946512281895e-05, 1.9458006136119366e-05, 2.062495332211256e-05, 1.829105895012617e-05, 1.716695260256529e-05, 3.458303399384022e-05, 2.7833040803670883e-05, 1.8291990272700787e-05]
Average: 2.484580036252737e-05

Task3: Increase age for customers over 60
Mysql: 
Query: UPDATE customers_temp SET age = age + 1 WHERE age > 60
Run times: [0.012055625091306865, 0.010722208069637418, 0.010374082950875163, 0.0103228340158239, 0.01289462496060878, 0.01026599993929267, 0.010562458075582981, 0.011875457945279777, 0.02274608297739178, 0.010008792043663561]
Average: 0.01218281660694629

MongoDB:
Query: db.customers_temp.update_many({"age": {"$gt": 60}}, {"$inc": {"age":1}})
Run times: [0.027723416918888688, 0.02587200002744794, 0.022942124982364476, 0.023033165954984725, 0.02260079199913889, 0.01882741693407297, 0.01990799990016967, 0.01920304202940315, 0.020103749935515225, 0.02060283289756626]
Average: 0.0220816541579552

Task4: Count sessions per customer
Mysql:
Query: SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, COUNT(ws.session_id) AS session_count FROM customers c JOIN watch_sessions ws ON c.customer_id = ws.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id;
Run times: [0.07269533292856067, 0.06229300005361438, 0.05102133296895772, 0.049805832910351455, 0.04991729196626693, 0.05178850004449487, 0.050839541014283895, 0.05175375007092953, 0.05115504201967269, 0.050432250020094216]
Average: 0.05417018739972264

MongoDB:
Query: db.customers.aggregate([{"$lookup": {"from": "watch_sessions", "localField": "_id", "foreignField": "customer_id", "as": "sessions"}},{"$project": {"customer_id": "$_id","name": 1,"session_count": { "$size": "$sessions" }}}])
Run times: [3.1644060839898884, 3.1248417500173673, 3.122388374991715, 3.1094906670041382, 3.125567208044231, 3.108858040999621, 3.1051872500684112, 3.1116647500311956, 3.1248022499494255, 3.1072195830056444]
Average: 3.1204425958101636


Task5: Customers who watched Action movies
Mysql:
Query: SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, c.age, c.contact_number, c.email, w.genre, w.session_id FROM customers c JOIN watch_sessions w ON c.customer_id = w.customer_id WHERE w.genre = 'Action'
Run times: [0.22434558300301433, 0.17926512495614588, 0.1996417910559103, 0.17397187498863786, 0.1842590420274064, 0.18441837502177805, 0.17498637503013015, 0.17979949992150068, 0.17982533294707537, 0.17348679201677442]
Average: 0.18539997909683734

MongoDB:
Query: db.customers.aggregate([{"$lookup": {"from": "watch_sessions","localField": "_id","foreignField": "customer_id","as": "sessions"}}, { "$unwind": "$sessions"}, {"$match": {"sessions.movie.genre": "Action"}}, {"$project": {"_id": 0,"customer_id": "$_id","name": 1,"age": 1,"contact_number": 1,"email": 1,"genre": "$sessions.movie.genre","session_id": "$sessions._id"}}])
Run times: [1.2481917499098927, 1.1857420420274138, 1.1677476250333712, 1.1669886249583215, 1.1692869579419494, 1.1640157499350607, 1.1682201250223443, 1.1722404160536826, 1.16856891696807, 1.1656659160507843]
Average: 1.177666812390089

Chris:

Task 6: Customers with missing phone but email present
SQL Query:
SELECT * FROM customers WHERE contact_number IS NULL AND email IS NOT NULL

Run times: [0.009124200034420937, 0.005153200007043779, 0.004879300016909838, 0.005295499984640628, 0.005776100035291165, 0.004966000036802143, 0.005145000002812594, 0.005014299997128546, 0.004999500000849366, 0.00516790000256151]

Average: 0.005552100011846051

MongoDB Query:
db.customers.find({"contact_number" : None, "email" : {"$exists" : True,"$ne": None}})

Run times: [5.360000068321824e-05, 0.00020210002548992634, 9.740004315972328e-05, 0.00012310000602155924, 6.970000686123967e-05, 6.310001481324434e-05, 4.549999721348286e-05, 0.00011989998165518045, 4.509999416768551e-05, 4.499999340623617e-05]

Average: 8.645000634714961e-05

Task 7: Delete sessions with no moods recorded
SQL Query:
DELETE FROM watch_sessions_temp WHERE mood1 IS NULL AND mood2 IS NULL

Run times: [0.21377139998367056, 0.17767890001414344, 0.22532279998995364, 0.1623453000211157, 0.18061470001703128, 0.21962719998555258, 0.20519269997021183, 0.22001649998128414, 0.16842579998774454, 0.1917074999655597]

Average: 0.19647027999162675

MongoDB Query:
db.watch_sessions_temp.delete_many({"$or": [{"moods" : None}, {"moods" : []}, {"moods" : {"$exists" : False}}]})

Run times: [5.360000068321824e-05, 0.00020210002548992634, 9.740004315972328e-05, 0.00012310000602155924, 6.970000686123967e-05, 6.310001481324434e-05, 4.549999721348286e-05, 0.00011989998165518045, 4.509999416768551e-05, 4.499999340623617e-05]

Average: 0.11815495000919327

Task 8: Distinct watch dates
SQL Query:
SELECT DISTINCT watch_date FROM watch_sessions

Run times: [0.11001819994999096, 0.03779989999020472, 0.03382630000123754, 0.036863200017251074, 0.031970699958037585, 0.035345799988135695, 0.03314240003237501, 0.031107200018595904, 0.0344261999707669, 0.03377059998456389]

Average: 0.04182704999111593

MongoDB Query:
db.watch_sessions.distinct("watch_date")

Run times: [0.18841649999376386, 0.08140530000673607, 0.07929790002526715, 0.0760827999911271, 0.07148849999066442, 0.07207400002516806, 0.07422080001560971, 0.06606499996269122, 0.06355899997288361, 0.06904020003275946]

Average: 0.08416500000166707

Task 9: Delete customers over 60 with no email
Task 10: Sessions with excited but not bored
SQL Query:
SELECT * FROM watch_sessions WHERE (mood1 = "excited" OR mood2 = "excited") AND mood1 != "bored" AND mood2 != "bored"

Run times: [0.19476340000983328, 0.18163980002282187, 0.18340629996964708, 0.1861417000181973, 0.18395500001497567, 0.18196390004595742, 0.1952515000011772, 0.18067060003522784, 0.17998270003590733, 0.18110330001218244]

Average: 0.18488782001659274

MongoDB Query:
db.watch_sessions.find({"moods" : {"$in" : ["excited"], "$nin" : ["bored"]}})

Run times: [6.65000407025218e-05, 0.00011339999036863446, 0.00011000002268701792, 5.9500045608729124e-05, 6.059999577701092e-05, 7.840001489967108e-05, 6.609997944906354e-05, 6.839999696239829e-05, 5.289999535307288e-05, 5.4299947805702686e-05]

Average: 7.301000296138227e-05
